privileged_info_summary: Task outline_numbering_handbook@1 uses synthetic data generated programmatically during task setup. The input document is created via python-docx in setup_task.sh with a well-defined structure: 6 Heading 1 sections (General Employment Policies, Compensation and Benefits, Time Off and Leave Policies, Workplace Conduct and Ethics, Health Safety and Security, Separation and Termination), 12 Heading 2 subsections, and 8 Heading 3 sub-subsections. All heading texts and counts in metadata exactly match the document generation code. The task expects agent to apply proper heading styles and configure outline numbering, saving output to /home/ga/Documents/handbook_numbered.docx with a text export for verification.
